subject: URGENT: Contract needs signing by EOD
body: We need the signed contract today or we will have to go with another vendor. This is time sensitive.

subject: Server is down - immediate action required
body: Our production server has been down for 2 hours. Clients are affected. Need your team to fix this ASAP.

subject: Legal deadline tomorrow
body: Reminder that the legal filing deadline is tomorrow at 5pm. Please send all required documents by noon.

subject: Investment meeting - urgent response needed
body: We have a board meeting Friday and need your Q2 numbers by Thursday EOD to proceed with the investment.

subject: Lunch tomorrow?
body: Hey, want to grab lunch tomorrow around noon? Let me know.

subject: Team building event next month
body: Hi team, just a reminder about the team building event scheduled for next month. Please RSVP by Friday.

subject: Weekly standup notes
body: Here are the notes from today's standup. We discussed the new feature rollout and bug fixes for next sprint.

subject: 50% OFF today only!
body: Don't miss our biggest sale of the year! Shop now and save 50% on everything. Limited time offer!

subject: You have been selected for a prize
body: Congratulations! You have been selected to receive a free gift. Click here to claim your prize now!

subject: Special loan offer just for you
body: You qualify for our special low interest loan. Apply now and get approved in minutes. No credit check required!
